raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and declaration of relational principles",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "mutuality is attainable and desirable in relationships",
    "the speaker has previously engaged in collapse or overgiving",
    "authentic presence without self-abandonment is possible and preferable",
    "co-regulation in truth is a distinct and superior alternative to safety-seeking overgiving",
    "others are capable of meeting the speaker as they are"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent; each clause reinforces a coherent stance of balanced, non-collapsing mutuality",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker applies the principles behaviorally over time and the relational context supports reciprocal engagement",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement functions as aspirational self-image rather than enacted practice, or the terms remain vague enough to mask continued imbalance"
}
